title: False-positive proc_arst detection leads to strange situations
code_blocks:
always @(posedge clock_0 or posedge clock_2) begin
    if (1'h1) begin
      $write("always block is triggered......\n");
    end
    if (1'h0) begin
      $write("now in clock_2 == true branch\n");
    end
    if (1'h1) begin
      $write("now in clock_2 == false branch\n");
    end
  end

if (clock_2) begin
            $display("now in clock_2 == true branch");
